Container.Name: ChannelHoarder
Container.Overview: ChannelHoarder is a self-hosted video channel archiver with a modern web UI. Monitor and automatically download videos from YouTube, Rumble, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo, and Odysee. Videos are saved in Plex-compatible TV Show format (Channel / Season Year / S01E01 - Title). Features a built-in PO token server so no YouTube account or cookies are required. Includes real-time download progress, per-channel quality settings, Shorts filtering, Telegram/Pushover notifications, and import support for existing video libraries.
Container.Changes:
### v1.4.2 - Fixed PUID/PGID — downloaded files are now owned by the configured user instead of root - Added /cookies volume mount to template - Removed deprecated docker-compose version key
### v1.4.1 - Simplified queue controls — download-now button for direct queue bypass
### v1.4.0 - Queue controls with download-now and inline standalone download progress

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Web interface port. Access the UI at http://your-server-ip:8587

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Video download directory. Point your Plex TV Shows library here.

Config.Name: Cookies Watch Dir
Config.Description: Optional: drop an updated cookies.txt here and it will be picked up automatically

Config.Name: Extra Media Path
Config.Description: Optional: additional host path for per-channel custom download directories outside /downloads

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Use 99 for nobody on Unraid.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Use 100 for users on Unraid.

Config.Name: YouTube API Key
Config.Description: Optional: YouTube Data API v3 key for faster and more reliable channel discovery

Config.Name: PO Token Server
Config.Description: Enable built-in PO token server for YouTube authentication (recommended)
